## Summary
- What changed?
- Why now?

## Agent execution context
- Source issue:
- Risk tier (low/medium/high):
- Repositories touched:

## Validation
- [ ] `node framework/scripts/validate-schemas.js`
- [ ] Any repo-specific checks run and passed

## Parallel workflow safety
- [ ] Concurrency group considered
- [ ] Timeout(s) set for long-running jobs
- [ ] Duplicate/race behavior considered

## Manual/admin follow-ups (if any)
- [ ] Secrets/environment changes
- [ ] Branch protection updates
- [ ] Firewall allow-list / network policy updates

## Rollback plan
- Describe the quickest safe rollback path.
